name: Sales
description: Sales pipeline, deals, contacts, and revenue data owned by the sales organization.

entity.name: Sales
entity.description: Sales pipeline, deals, contacts, and revenue data owned by the sales organization.

metadata.typical_owner_role: Head of Sales / VP Sales / Sales Operations
best_practices: Update deal stages daily to maintain accurate forecasting
Require valid email for all contacts to enable marketing automation
Log activities within 24 hours of occurrence
Use consistent naming conventions for deal names
Set close dates based on realistic timelines, not wishful thinking

data_products.name: Workflow / Deals
data_products.description: Active and closed sales opportunities with stages, values, and ownership.

data_products.name: Contacts
data_products.description: Individuals associated with accounts and deals.

data_products.name: Activities
data_products.description: Sales activities including calls, emails, meetings.

contracts.name: Workflow to Finance
contracts.description: Share workflow data for revenue forecasting

contracts.name: Deals to Marketing
contracts.description: Share closed deal data for attribution and ROI analysis
